[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00011001 3
1 11000011 4
2 11001010 4
3 00000010 1
4 10100110 4
5 10101110 5
6 00011111 5
7 01100101 4

01 10 00001110 3
12 21 00000101 2
23 32 01100101 4 match 7
34 43 01000001 2
45 54 01000000 1
56 65 00000000 a
67 76 00000010 1 match 3
70 07 10100110 4 match 4

02 20 00100100 2
13 31 00010101 3
24 42 01000001 2
35 53 01100100 3
46 64 00000000 a
57 75 00100100 2
60 06 00000010 1 match 3
71 17 00000110 2

03 30 00100100 2
14 41 00000001 1
25 52 01100100 3
36 63 00000000 a
47 74 10000000 1
50 05 00101100 3
61 16 00000010 1 match 3
72 27 00100100 2

04 40 10000000 1
15 51 00001100 2
26 62 00000000 a
37 73 00100100 2
